name: SCC_GetMeterInfoData
title: SCC_GetMeterInfoData
syntax: void SCC_GetMeterInfoData ( char MeterID, float& MeterReading, byte SigMeterReading, long& MeterStatus, long& TMeter )
return: Returns Data assigned to the meter: ID (32 characters), current meter reading in [Wh], signature, status and timestamp in UNIX format Length of signature is dependent on the encryption algorithm.
